flashcards.definition: Large body of air with relatively uniform temperature and humidity; classified by source region.
Boundary where cold air advances under warm air; produces heavy, brief precipitation and sharp temperature drops.
Boundary where warm air advances over cold air; produces gradual, steady precipitation.
Area of rising air, convergence at the surface, and divergence aloft; associated with clouds and precipitation.
Area of sinking air, divergence at the surface; associated with clear skies and calm weather.
